videos.title: Can You Re-Grow Knee Cartilage? (maybe)
videos.summary_source_text:
Can You Re-Grow Knee Cartilage? (maybe) Can you regrow knee cartilage? 

Maybe.

In November 2025, Stanford researchers published a study in Science showing that blocking an aging related enzyme called 15-PGDH triggered the regeneration of articular (hyaline) cartilage in mice. The treatment also prevented osteoarthritis from developing after knee injuries in mice, and human cartilage samples responded by producing new cartilage in the lab. 

That's a huge breakthrough.

But here's the reality:

We still don't know if the same results will happen in people. Human clinical trials are needed, and safety is the biggest unanswered question. Any therapy that changes tissue regeneration has to be carefully studied for unintended effects before it becomes widely available.

That said, this feels like one of those moments that could change the future of joint health.

GLP-1 drugs transformed obesity treatment almost overnight. It's possible that, over the next decade, we'll see a similar breakthrough for cartilage repair.

For anyone living with knee arthritis, that's a reason for cautious optimism. Can you regrow knee cartilage?

videos.title: The McDavid Breakaway Formula
videos.summary_source_text:
The McDavid Breakaway Formula The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body’s own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness.
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

1 banana.

A few frozen blueberries.

videos.title: This Mobility Test Explains Your Swing  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
This Mobility Test Explains Your Swing  #golfswing #golftips This simple 90/90 mobility test gives you a clear look at how your right arm should function in the golf swing. From a 5-iron posture, lift and rotate the arm until it matches your spine angle—if you can’t get there, your backswing is likely compensating by standing up or losing posture. That compensation often leads to poor ball striking and inconsistent contact. Your swing should reflect what your body can actually do, even if that means a shorter backswing.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. This simple 90/90 mobility test gives you a clear look at how your right arm should function in the golf swing. videos.title: Rub This on Your Heels Before Bed… See What Happens Overnight | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Rub This on Your Heels Before Bed… See What Happens Overnight | Dr. Mandell Dry, rough, and cracked heels can become uncomfortable, but this simple bedtime routine may help soften and protect the skin while you sleep. In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains how applying plain, fragrance-free, purified white petroleum jelly to slightly damp heels and covering them with clean cotton socks can reduce moisture loss and help the skin feel smoother and more flexible by morning. You will also learn why the skin around the heels becomes thick and cracked, how pressure from walking, standing, dry air, unsupported footwear, and aging can contribute, and why consistency is important when the dryness has been present for a long time. Purified skin-grade white petroleum jelly from a reputable manufacturer is highly refined and is very different from unrefined petroleum materials. It works by forming a protective barrier that helps seal existing moisture into the skin rather than adding moisture itself. For additional improvement, gentle use of a pumice stone or foot file after soaking may help remove excess thickened skin, while creams containing urea, lactic acid, salicylic acid, or alpha hydroxy acids may be useful for particularly rough heels. Never cut hardened skin with a razor or sharp instrument, and avoid trapping heavy moisture between the toes. This routine is intended for ordinary dryness and mild cracking. Deep, bleeding, infected, swollen, foul-smelling, or severely painful cracks require professional attention. Anyone with diabetes, neuropathy, poor circulation, or reduced sensation should be especially cautious with foot problems. With only a few minutes of care before bedtime, your heels may feel noticeably softer and more comfortable when you wake up.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Stop Wasting Money on This Magnesium!
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Wasting Money on This Magnesium! Not all magnesium supplements are created equal. The type of magnesium you take can make a huge difference in absorption and results.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4uTK4AO

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Common forms of magnesium
• Magnesium oxide: ~4% absorption, high laxative effect
• Magnesium sulfate: ~10% absorption
• Magnesium orotate: ~15% absorption, supports cellular energy and DNA
• Magnesium taurate: ~20% absorption, supports the heart, blood pressure, and nervous system
• Magnesium lactate: ~25% absorption, gentler on digestion, supports energy and cardiovascular health
• Magnesium citrate: ~30% absorption, commonly used for kidney stones, detoxification, and blood pressure support
• Magnesium malate: ~40% absorption, supports energy, muscles, chronic fatigue, and fibromyalgia
• Magnesium threonate: ~75% absorption
• Magnesium glycinate: up to ~80% absorption

Magnesium glycinate is often preferred because it’s highly absorbable, gentle on the digestive system, and commonly used for:
• Sleep
• Relaxation
• Stress
• Muscle spasms
• Migraines

One of magnesium’s most important jobs is helping vitamin D function properly in the body.

#magnesium #magnesiumglycinate #magnesiumdeficiency #sleep #stress #musclespasms #migraine #vitamind #supplements #healthtips

This video is for general informational purposes only. It should not be used to self-diagnose and it is not a substitute for a medical exam, cure, treatment, diagnosis, prescription, or recommendation. videos.title: What's In Sahith Theegala's Golf Bag? | The Open Special
videos.summary_source_text:
What's In Sahith Theegala's Golf Bag? | The Open Special We take a look inside Sahith Theegala’s golf bag to see the clubs, specs and setup he trusts for The Open. From driver to putter, Sahith talks us through his full WITB and the thinking behind each club.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Who Is Closest to Superintelligence in 2026? OpenAI vs Anthropic vs Google vs xAI
videos.summary_source_text:
Who Is Closest to Superintelligence in 2026? OpenAI vs Anthropic vs Google vs xAI Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Who is actually closest to superintelligence in 2026?

OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and xAI are all racing toward the future of artificial intelligence — but they are not racing toward the same goal.

In this deep dive, we analyze the real AI race using official documents, model releases, benchmarks, pricing, and public statements to answer one question:

Who is actually closest to superintelligence?

We compare:

00:01:09 The only AI lab with an actual superintelligence blueprint
00:03:34 Anthropic: the capability leader nobody can fully use
00:05:18 OpenAI vs Google: racing toward a moving target
00:06:43 xAI Grok: competing on price instead of maximum capability
00:07:45 Microsoft’s unexpected AI strategy shift
00:09:14 Why nobody has created a real superintelligence benchmark
00:10:17 The limitations behind the AI race headlines
00:11:24 The final verdict

The biggest question in AI right now is not simply "who has the smartest model?"

The real question is: who is defining what superintelligence actually means?

This video explores the future of AI, AGI, frontier models, AI safety, OpenAI GPT, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, xAI Grok, and the race to build the next generation of artificial intelligence.

Subscribe for deep analysis on AI breakthroughs, frontier models, and the future of technology.

Dak Prescott: It's SUPER BOWL or BUST for the Cowboys in 2026 👀 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Dak Prescott met with the media during his charity event and covered much more than football. The Cowboys quarterback discussed why giving back to the community is so important, what it means to have teammates supporting his foundation, and why being a good neighbor is bigger than anything that happens on the field.

Dak also didn't shy away from the expectations facing the Dallas Cowboys this season, making it clear that the standard remains Super Bowl or bust.

The DLLS Cowboys Podcast breaks down everything Dak Prescott said, what it means for Brian Schottenheimer's team, and whether the Cowboys are truly built to compete for a championship this season.

If you love Dallas Cowboys coverage, hit LIKE, SUBSCRIBE, and turn on notifications so you never miss a show.

If you treat your backswing and downswing as two separate events, this golf instruction lesson will change how you think about your golf swing. Eric Cogorno and Steve Sieracki break down the ground-up sequence — leg flex, trail hip to the midline, hips flowing forward — that separates the best ball strikers from high handicap golfers. Watch how PGA Tour Pro Tommy Fleetwood uses this exact hip and leg motion to create one of the most coordinated, flowing transitions in professional golf — and how these high handicap golf tips give any golfer the same checkpoints to work from. Getting this sequence right gives you better contact, more power, and a more inside-out swing path. If you leave this video without trying the belt buckle forward drill, you're leaving consistency and distance on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why high handicap golfers treat the backswing and downswing as two separate events — and how to fix it
• How foot flare and leg flex control hip turn and tilt during the backswing
• How much trail leg flex to lose during the backswing and why it matters for golf instruction
• The trail hip to midline checkpoint: where your trail hip should be at the top of the swing
• How PGA Tour Pro Tommy Fleetwood uses hip and leg motion to create a flowing backswing to downswing transition
• Why the hips start moving toward the target before the backswing is finished
• The belt buckle forward drill for feeling correct hip motion through the ball
• How correct hip and leg motion creates an inside-out swing path for less pulls and fades

Eric Cogorno and Steve Sieracki break down the ground-up sequence — leg flex, trail hip to the midline, hips flowing forward — that separates the best ball strikers from high handicap golfers. Watch how PGA Tour Pro Tommy Fleetwood uses this exact hip and leg motion to create one of the most coordinated, flowing transitions in professional golf — and how these high handicap golf tips give any golfer the same checkpoints to work from. Getting this sequence right gives you better contact, more power, and a more inside-out swing path. If you leave this video without trying the belt buckle forward drill, you're leaving consistency and distance on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why high handicap golfers treat the backswing and downswing as two separate events — and how to fix it
• How foot flare and leg flex control hip turn and tilt during the backswing
• How much trail leg flex to lose during the backswing and why it matters for golf instruction
• The trail hip to midline checkpoint: where your trail hip should be at the top of the swing
• How PGA Tour Pro Tommy Fleetwood uses hip and leg motion to create a flowing backswing to downswing transition
• Why the hips start moving toward the target before the backswing is finished
• The belt buckle forward drill for feeling correct hip motion through the ball
• How correct hip and leg motion creates an inside-out swing path for less pulls and fades

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4oJDLhJ

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Common vitamin D deficiency symptoms include:
• Sweating on the head when the rest of the body is cool
• Unexplained mood changes
• Lack of motivation or procrastination
• Panic attacks
• Deep bone pain in the hips, pelvis, lower back, or thighs
• Muscle weakness
• Morning stiffness in the knees and fingers
• Exhaustion despite getting enough sleep
• Brain fog, slowed thinking, or trouble concentrating
• Feeling hungry even after a full meal

If you have several of these symptoms, it may be worth getting your vitamin D levels checked.

videos.title: The Simple Way To Strike Your Irons
videos.summary_source_text:
The Simple Way To Strike Your Irons If you struggle to strike your irons consistently, hitting the ground before the golf ball is usually at the heart of the problem. One shot comes out fat, the next is thin, and occasionally you top it along the ground.

In this golf lesson, Danny Maude shows you the simple way to create ball-first contact, control the low point of your golf swing and strike your irons more consistently — without rebuilding your entire swing or spending hours on the range.

FREE IRON-STRIKING PRACTICE PLAN

Follow the lesson step by step with Danny’s free practice plan:

https://www.dannymaude.com/simple-way-to-strike-your-irons-consistently

In this video, you’ll discover:

◼ The only contact rule you need to strike your irons consistently
◼ Why fat, thin and topped iron shots often come from the same mistake
◼ How your chest position and weight influence where the club touches the ground
◼ Why keeping your weight forward isn’t always enough to guarantee ball-first contact
◼ How a simple stone-skimming action helps prevent an early release
◼ The two checkpoints that make consistent iron striking much easier
◼ Where to position the golf ball for cleaner, more reliable contact

The goal is simple: strike the golf ball first, then allow the club to touch the ground beyond it.

But to do that consistently, you need to control two things: where your body is positioned relative to the ball and how your trail arm releases the golf club.

Danny explains how keeping your chest and weight forward helps move the bottom of your swing arc beyond the golf ball. He then shows you why many golfers still hit fat and thin shots because their trail arm straightens too early.

Using the feeling of skimming a stone across a pond, you’ll learn how to release the golf club around your body rather than throwing it directly down towards the ground.

This simple combination can help you:

◼ Stop hitting the ground before the golf ball
◼ Reduce fat and thin iron shots
◼ Create more consistent ball-first contact
◼ Improve your low-point control
◼ Strike wedges, mid-irons and long irons more reliably

CHAPTERS

00:15 The Only Rule for Consistent Iron Contact

02:47 Why Your Chest Must Stay Forward
03:08 What Happens When You Hang Back
03:42 Why Weight Forward Isn’t Enough

videos.title: Osteoporosis Isn't a Calcium Deficiency (Doctors Get This Wrong)
videos.summary_source_text:
Osteoporosis Isn't a Calcium Deficiency (Doctors Get This Wrong) Can calcium make osteoporosis worse? If you’re taking a calcium supplement for osteoporosis, it may not be supporting bone strength and bone density the way you think. Discover how to support bone health the right way, and why calcium supplements alone may not be enough. 

0:00 Calcium and osteoporosis
0:45 What causes osteoporosis?
1:04 Magnesium for bones 
1:30 Parathyroid hormone and osteoporosis
2:31 Bone density vs. bone strength
3:38 Magnesium deficiency
4:33 Common osteoporosis treatment 
5:49 How to reverse osteoporosis
6:40 Vitamin D, osteoporosis, and osteomalacia
7:47 Vitamin K2 
8:36 Bone health tips
9:30 Should I take calcium for osteoporosis?

🌟 Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/3SYBeVk

Watch these next to learn more about the nutrients that support healthy bones:
▶️ https://youtu.be/89jJ1JlNZlg
▶️ https://youtu.be/MwZ63SFmkPE
▶️ https://youtu.be/Sn7T46fCjLE

Learn more about osteoporosis and osteopenia in this article: https://drbrg.co/4wPMFgA

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Osteoporosis is not simply a calcium deficiency. Bones store calcium, phosphorus, and more than half of the body’s magnesium. Magnesium helps regulate calcium, supports vitamin D function, and plays an important role in bone health.

One of the most common factors associated with osteoporosis is elevated parathyroid hormone related to low vitamin D. Low magnesium can also affect parathyroid hormone. Some people have normal calcium levels but still develop severe osteoporosis, showing that bone density and bone strength are not always the same.

Magnesium deficiency is difficult to detect with a standard blood test and may go unnoticed until it becomes more severe. Chronic stress and certain medications, including prednisone and proton pump inhibitors (PPIs), may also affect bone health.

If you have osteoporosis, getting enough magnesium is important. Focus on magnesium-rich foods, magnesium glycinate, vitamin D, and vitamin K2 to help support healthy bones and maintain bone density.

https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12626859/

videos.title: Best-Sounding Drag Race EVER? Porsche Carrera GT v Lexus LFA
videos.summary_source_text:
Best-Sounding Drag Race EVER? Porsche Carrera GT v Lexus LFA We’re drag racing the Porsche Carrera GT and Lexus LFA over the quarter-mile and half-mile. We’ll also be comparing the two in a brake test. 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1807

It’s time for the ultimate Germany vs Japan showdown! 

We’ve got our hands on the exceptional Porsche Carrera GT, and it’s facing off against one of the most famous Japanese exports of all-time - the Lexus LFA! 

The question is, which of these legendary V10s will come out on top? Let’s check out the stats… 

Starting with the Porsche, it’s powered by a 5.7-litre naturally-aspirated V1- that delivers 612hp and 590Nm. This power is sent to the rear wheels only via a 6-speed manual gearbox, and the car weighs in at 1,380kg. When it was first released, it cost around £330,000, but as of today, it’s valued at about £2,000,000! 

Next up, we have the Lexus LFA. It’s powered by a 4.8-litre naturally-aspirated V10, and this creates 560hp and 480Nm. Power is sent to the rear wheels only via a 6-speed auto gearbox, and the car tips the scales at £340,000. As new, it cost around £340,000, but as of today, it’s valued at around £750,000. 

So how will this play out - will the auto gearbox of the LFA power it to victory? Or will the extra power in the Porsche propel it to the finish line first? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE!

Thanks to everyone who helped set up this race: 
- Porsche Carrera GT: https://www.instagram.com/the.peggcollection/ 
- Lexus LFA: https://www.instagram.com/dkengineering/ We’re drag racing the Porsche Carrera GT and Lexus LFA over the quarter-mile and half-mile. We’ll also be comparing the two in a brake test.

videos.title: 17.07.26 - RIFT Education Day
videos.summary_source_text:
17.07.26 - RIFT Education Day RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

How to Use Kimi K3 for Free (K3 vs K3 Swarm, Token Limits, Best Settings)

The video shows how to access and use Kimi K3 for free at kimi.com by signing in with a free account, switching the default model from K2.6 to K3 (or K3 Swarm), and choosing settings that conserve tokens. The creator recommends avoiding K3 Swarm on a free plan due to token limits, keeping the context window on standard (extra-long is premium), and adjusting thinking effort (standard/high/max) since higher effort uses more tokens. It also highlights API testing results, examples of games/3D worlds and video generation using ReMotion, mentions free usage may be paused during peak times, and says Kimi K3 will be open source from July 2026 but requires powerful hardware to run locally.

videos.title: Hindi - 17.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 17.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. 0:11 — Moonshot introduces Kimi K3, a frontier AI model built for agentic coding, complex projects and long-running knowledge work
SOURCE: https://www.kimi.com/en
0:40 — Reuters examines how the 2.8-trillion-parameter Kimi K3 is closing in on America’s most powerful closed AI models
SOURCE: https://www.reuters.com/world/china/chinas-moonshot-unveils-worlds-largest-open-ai-model-closing-us-rivals-2026-07-17/

Kimi K3 suggests China may no longer be months behind America in advanced AI. Its scale, open weights, lower pricing and coding performance could pressure OpenAI and Anthropic while strengthening China’s attempt to reshape who controls global AI.

videos.title: Why Ezra Christensen’s Eligibility Case is Likely to go Coach Prime & Colorado’s Way
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Ezra Christensen’s Eligibility Case is Likely to go Coach Prime & Colorado’s Way Ezra Christensen’s NCAA eligibility case could be trending in Coach Prime and Colorado’s favor after a similar legal win for Oklahoma State’s Kashie Natt, who was granted a court order to rejoin the Cowboys after his waiver was canceled. We break down why Darren Heitner’s strategy, the Boulder County lawsuit, and the push for a temporary restraining order or preliminary injunction could give Christensen a real path to playing for the Colorado Buffaloes in 2026. With Christensen viewed as a potential NFL Draft prospect and a key piece of Deion Sanders’ defensive line, this case could have massive implications for Colorado football, NCAA eligibility rules, and the future of JUCO athletes fighting for extra eligibility.

It’s Day 5 of ALLCITY Spirit Week 2026. Today’s theme: Quiz Show Day
15 restricted free agents elected to go to salary arbitration this summer, but, as of the start of today’s show, that number has already been cut in half before the first hearing has even taken place. Seven still remain, with Philadelphia Flyers defenseman Jamie Drysdale scheduled for Monday, July 20th, while Dallas Stars forward Jason Robertson is slated for Saturday, July 25th. videos.title: Why Do The Best Players’ Blades Chatter?
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Do The Best Players’ Blades Chatter? The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Baldy on If Nik Bonitto Take the NEXT Step, Could Von Miller's Next Team Be the Broncos & More
videos.summary_source_text:
Baldy on If Nik Bonitto Take the NEXT Step, Could Von Miller's Next Team Be the Broncos & More Brian Baldinger joins DNVR Broncos to break down whether Nik Bonitto can take the next step and chase Von Miller’s Denver Broncos single-season sack record. Baldy also discusses Von Miller’s possible next NFL team, why a Broncos reunion could make sense, and what he saw from Bonitto at the Sack Summit. Plus, the crew dives into Bo Nix, Jaylen Waddle, Courtland Sutton, Denver’s offensive line rankings, Jarrett Stidham’s roster spot, and whether the Kansas City Chiefs’ roster around Patrick Mahomes is still good enough. Get the latest Broncos news, NFL training camp storylines, and Baldy’s biggest takeaways on Sean Payton’s team heading into the season.

videos.title: Never Cook Garlic Right After Crushing It… Here’s Why | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Never Cook Garlic Right After Crushing It… Here’s Why | Dr. Mandell Garlic is one of the most powerful and widely used foods in the world, but the way you prepare it can make a meaningful difference. When you crush, mince, grate, or finely chop fresh garlic, you break open its plant cells and allow a natural enzyme called alliinase to interact with a sulfur-containing compound called alliin. This reaction helps form allicin, the compound responsible for garlic’s strong aroma and many of the potential health effects scientists continue to study. However, exposing garlic to high heat immediately after chopping may reduce this natural reaction before it has enough time to occur. By crushing your garlic and allowing it to rest for approximately 10 minutes before cooking, you may help preserve more of these beneficial sulfur compounds. In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains what happens inside garlic after it is crushed, why waiting before cooking may be helpful, and how garlic may support healthy circulation, blood-vessel function, cholesterol levels, antioxidant protection, immune function, digestion, and the gut microbiome when included as part of a balanced lifestyle. You will also learn the best ways to prepare garlic, why gently cooking it may be preferable to burning it at high temperatures, and how to use it in vegetables, soups, sauces, beans, lentils, hummus, salad dressings, and many other healthy meals. Garlic is not a miracle cure and should never replace medication, medical care, exercise, or a nutritious diet, but this simple kitchen habit costs nothing, takes almost no additional effort, and may help you get more from a food you already use. People with reflux, digestive sensitivity, bleeding disorders, upcoming surgery, or those taking blood-thinning medications should speak with a qualified healthcare professional before consuming unusually large amounts or concentrated garlic supplements. The next time you prepare garlic, remember this simple sequence: crush it, wait approximately 10 minutes, cook it gently, and enjoy it as part of a healthy meal.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

OpenAI reportedly scrapped its original GPT-6 foundation model—internally known as Spud—despite reports suggesting it contained nearly 4 trillion parameters.

In this video, we break down the latest GPT-6 reports, explain why OpenAI may have abandoned a massive training run, and examine how Anthropic's rumored Claude Fable 5.1 could be reshaping the AI race.

Unlike sensational headlines, this video separates confirmed information from leaks, rumors, and speculation to explain what may actually be happening behind the scenes.

videos.title: Kimi K3: Don't Believe the Hype (I Paid to Test)
videos.summary_source_text:
Kimi K3: Don't Believe the Hype (I Paid to Test) Join us at 🎉 https://mrc.fm/cmc

Kimi K3 is sitting at number one on the arena leaderboard above Claude Fable 5 and GPT 5.6 and the internet is calling it the end of American AI. So is it real, or is it all hype and propaganda? I paid Moonshot $19 and ran four identical head to head builds against Claude Fable 5: a playable voxel game, a motion graphics launch video coded from a single prompt, a neon synth pad and a full brand website it had to research itself. Kimi K3 won one of those tests and what happened in the other three is exactly why my money is staying with Claude for now. Watch this before you switch.

videos.title: Advanced Liver Problems Rarely Have Any Symptoms
videos.summary_source_text:
Advanced Liver Problems Rarely Have Any Symptoms Advanced liver problems rarely cause any pain or obvious symptoms, no yellowing skin, no warning signs. Why? Because your liver itself has no nerve endings. But the sac surrounding it does, which is why liver swelling can refer pain to your right shoulder or upper trap.  

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/3StFMm8

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

The good news? A fatty or inflamed liver can be reversed. The key is catching it early, and you often can't rely on symptoms or even standard liver enzyme tests to do that. One simple visual clue: if you're carrying extra belly fat, it may be fat spilling over from an already-overloaded liver. An ultrasound is the most reliable way to check.

#liver #liverproblems #liverdisease #liverhealth #healthtips #health #fattyliver

videos.title: Lower Your Blood Pressure in Minutes with 2 Simple Techniques
videos.summary_source_text:
Lower Your Blood Pressure in Minutes with 2 Simple Techniques You can help lower your blood pressure in just a few minutes using two simple techniques. Slow breathing and brief sun exposure may help support healthy blood pressure naturally.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4vBzDlT

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Try these two approaches:
• Breathe in through your nose for 4 seconds, then exhale slowly through your nose for 6 seconds. Repeat for several minutes.
• Spend about 10 minutes in the sun to expose your skin to natural sunlight, which may help increase nitric oxide and support healthy blood vessel function.

Tracking your blood pressure before and after these techniques can help you see how your body responds.

#bloodpressure #nitricoxide #breathing #sunlight #hearthealth #cardiovascularhealth #wellness #healthtips #stressrelief #lowcarb

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: CIRCLE THE DATES! Carolina Hurricanes' 2026-27 Schedule is Officially Announced
videos.summary_source_text:
CIRCLE THE DATES! Carolina Hurricanes' 2026-27 Schedule is Officially Announced It's finally here: the 2026-27 regular season schedule dropped on Thursday for all 32 NHL teams. Regarding the Carolina Hurricanes, we know who they'll face for the upcoming 84-game season. They will face everyone in the Metropolitan Division four times each, and the Atlantic three times each. Outside of that, what should fans keep an eye on for this season? Also, we have another signing. On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes,  Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes' upcoming schedule. We have four games each against the Metro, three against the Atlantic, and two against the Western Conference, but how does it settle out? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the important dates to keep an eye on for fans this upcoming season. Plus, what else stood out from the schedule and more? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes signing William Håkansson to his three-year, entry-level contract. How does the deal break down over the next three seasons for the Swedish defenseman? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: State Of Texas Rangers As They Exit All-Star Break In First Place In AL West | DLLS Rangers Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
State Of Texas Rangers As They Exit All-Star Break In First Place In AL West | DLLS Rangers Podcast Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

An ALLCITY Network Production

The MLB All-Star break is all but over, with players across the game rejoining their teams for the resumption of play Friday. The Texas Rangers are headed to Atlanta for a three-game weekend series against the Braves. The Rangers do so in first place in the American League West by 1 1/2 games over the Mariners and as the only team in the division above .500 (49-47). There is room to improve, particularly in a bullpen that could use immediate help. The Rangers can win the division and make the playoffs, which fans should be excited about, but they need to be better.

videos.title: 16.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
16.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: A September Puck Drop? Avalanche Schedule Released | Locked On Avalanche
videos.summary_source_text:
A September Puck Drop? Avalanche Schedule Released | Locked On Avalanche Colorado Avalanche gear up for an expanded 84-game NHL schedule, opening the season at home against the LA Kings on September 30. Can the Avalanche outpace the Minnesota Wild and Dallas Stars in a Central Division race that may come down to the wire? Host Zach Pearson spotlights critical stretches—including nine back-to-backs, the coveted Winter Classic clash in Utah, and pivotal end-of-season showdowns with Minnesota—that could shape the team’s postseason fate.

Plus, Zach Pearson reacts to EA Sports NHL 27’s cover reveal, discusses Macklin Celebrini’s headline-making selection, and revisits iconic Avalanche cover moments featuring Cale Makar and the unforgettable Philip Grubauer Lake Tahoe look. Which games are Avalanche fans circling on their calendars, and did the schedule set the team up for success or a grueling grind? Don’t miss this fast-paced breakdown of Colorado’s anticipated quest for another Stanley Cup run.

videos.title: Hindi - 16.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 16.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

videos.title: Mira Murati's First AI Model Is Built on China's Blueprint... Wild
videos.summary_source_text:
Mira Murati's First AI Model Is Built on China's Blueprint... Wild Mira Murati’s Thinking Machines just released its first AI model, Inkling. It is fully open, handles text, images and audio, and uses ideas from DeepSeek plus training data generated by China’s Kimi, raising uncomfortable questions about who is really leading the global AI race.

Get the free 7-agent guide here: https://go.aiskool.io/7agents

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

📌 What You’ll See:
Thinking Machines officially introduces Inkling, its first open-weight multimodal AI model built for customization
SOURCE: https://thinkingmachines.ai/news/introducing-inkling/
The Financial Times reveals that Inkling draws from China’s DeepSeek architecture and Moonshot AI’s Kimi
SOURCE: https://www.ft.com/content/ef486929-d2c2-480b-8b00-9cb98bda6acf
Reuters explains how Inkling aims to become a Western alternative to the Chinese open models dominating the market
SOURCE: https://www.reuters.com/business/ai-startup-thinking-machines-launches-an-open-weight-ai-model-2026-07-15/
WIRED explores how Inkling can understand text, images, audio and video while even helping improve itself
SOURCE: https://www.wired.com/story/thinking-machines-lab-releases-its-first-model-inkling/
Axios explains why Thinking Machines is prioritizing customizable AI over winning every major benchmark
SOURCE: https://www.axios.com/2026/07/15/mira-murati-thinking-machines-open-weight-model-inkling
TechCrunch examines Thinking Machines’ plan to challenge one-size-fits-all AI using Inkling and its Tinker platform
SOURCE: https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/15/thinking-machines-amps-up-its-bet-against-one-size-fits-all-ai-with-its-first-open-model-inkling/

🚨 Why It Matters
Mira Murati left OpenAI, raised billions and built her first model using a blueprint influenced by Chinese AI. Inkling may trail the strongest models, but its openness, efficiency and customization strategy could reshape how businesses build and control their own AI.

videos.title: Sidney Crosby’s Scooter Attack Explained
videos.summary_source_text:
Sidney Crosby’s Scooter Attack Explained The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: Do The Nuggets Have a GUY in Trevon Brazile After He Dropped 32pts at Summer League?
videos.summary_source_text:
Do The Nuggets Have a GUY in Trevon Brazile After He Dropped 32pts at Summer League? Trevon Brazile exploded for 32 points, 6 rebounds, 1 steal, 1 block, and hit 6-of-12 from three in NBA Summer League, giving Denver Nuggets fans a major reason to believe they may have found a real piece for the future. We break down whether Brazile’s shooting, athleticism, pick-and-pop game, dunker spot potential, and fit next to Nikola Jokic can translate beyond Summer League. From his three-point upside to his ability to attack closeouts and stretch the floor, Trevon Brazile showed the exact skill set the Nuggets need from a young frontcourt player. Is this just a Summer League heater, or did Denver uncover a hidden gem who can become “a guy” for the Nuggets?

videos.title: How Your Lifestyle Affects Every Cell in your Body
videos.summary_source_text:
How Your Lifestyle Affects Every Cell in your Body Mitochondria are at the center of how the body produces energy, and the choices we make every day affect how well they function. What we eat, and even when we eat influence mitochondrial performance. As mitochondrial function changes, so does the amount of reactive oxygen species the body produces. That's why improving metabolic health starts with everyday habits.

This is a clip from my conversation with The @JesseChappus Show. You can find the conversation on their channel or in the collaborations on my channel.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

videos.title: Rub This on Your Hands Before Bed… They’ll Look Years Younger | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Rub This on Your Hands Before Bed… They’ll Look Years Younger | Dr. Mandell As we age, the skin on our hands often shows it first. Dryness, wrinkles, dark spots, and uneven texture can make our hands appear older than we feel. This simple at-home remedy using extra virgin olive oil, honey, lemon juice, and sugar works synergistically to moisturize, exfoliate, brighten, and rejuvenate the skin naturally. These ingredients penetrate deep into the skin barrier, support collagen formation, remove dead skin cells, reduce inflammation, and help restore a more youthful appearance. Use this two to three times weekly and you will begin noticing smoother, brighter, healthier-looking hands in just weeks.

Why this works so well
Extra virgin olive oil is rich in oleic acid and vitamin E, which strengthen the skin barrier and improve hydration. Honey acts as a natural humectant that pulls moisture into the skin while delivering antioxidants. Lemon juice provides vitamin C, which supports collagen and reduces hyperpigmentation. Sugar exfoliates the surface layer of dead skin cells, revealing softer and brighter skin underneath.

If you want your hands to look younger naturally without harsh chemicals, this powerful kitchen remedy can make a real difference.

📚 PubMed Research References 

• “Antioxidant and skin-protective properties of extra virgin olive oil phenols.” PubMed ID: 30098878
• “Honey in dermatology and skin aging. Antimicrobial and wound healing effects.” PubMed ID: 24305429
• “Topical vitamin C and its effect on collagen synthesis and skin rejuvenation.” PubMed ID: 18492141
• “Chemical exfoliants and skin renewal mechanisms.” PubMed ID: 25607907
• “Moisturizers, humectants, and skin barrier repair.” PubMed ID: 32091552
• “Citrus extracts and their skin-lightening effects through melanogenesis inhibition.” PubMed ID: 29172266


*********************************

videos.title: Protein bars in a minute! For muscle growth and a slim figure.
videos.summary_source_text:
Protein bars in a minute! For muscle growth and a slim figure. Protein bars in a minute! For muscle growth and a slim figure. A bean dessert you must try.

1½ cups (300 g) canned white beans. 1/2 cup (60 g) chocolate protein powder. I use rice protein.
1 banana. 1 apple.
This is the ultimate guilt-free chocolate treat — no sugar, no flour, just wholesome ingredients you can feel great about.
Trust me, you'd never guess these are made with white beans — they bake up rich, fudgy, and completely delicious.
Packed with protein and naturally sweetened with banana and apple, it's the kind of snack you can enjoy any time of day.
Optional: sprinkle with cacao nibs on top.
Bake in a preheated oven at 340°F (170°C) for about 15 mins.
As always, Molly is watching me cook. If you think she’s adorable, please give her a like, friends! ❤️

videos.title: Slice to Draw in ONE Lesson #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Slice to Draw in ONE Lesson #golfswing #golftips John’s club was going under the plane in the backswing and over the top on the way down — leading to pulls and slices. While his path stayed consistent, his clubface wasn’t. The best fix? Learning to create a draw shape. We set up a simple alignment stick station: one along the target line, one behind him on the swing plane, and one through the target. His goal was to take it back over the plane and come under through impact.
This visual drill completely changed John’s clubface control — and helped him start hitting solid draws.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. John’s club was going under the plane in the backswing and over the top on the way down — leading to pulls and slices. videos.title: A little #ThrowbackThursday - is that still a thing? 😉
videos.summary_source_text:
A little #ThrowbackThursday - is that still a thing? 😉 If you’re new here to MyGolfSpy (and there’s PLENTY of you) what’s up, hey, how you doin’?

A little bit about why we do what we do.

Simply put - this is all for you.

Year after year we became more fed up with what print had to tell you about your golf equipment.

There was no transparency, no unbiased results…no truth.

From that came the passion to serve and protect the golf consumer from the marketing hype that was manufactured by the big brands and published by countless magazines delivered right to your door, and your dad’s.

We approach testing equipment from clubs, gloves, bags, and balls from a datacratic mindset.

Whats that mean?

The results we provide you and your playing partners are stripped of any brand influence and based solely on the numbers.

What’s that saying?

The numbers don’t lie.

Performance is what matters and by all means - you’ll know what does…and more importantly what doesn’t.

1.2 MILLION shots
13 THOUSAND tests
321 COMPANIES trailed
4.8 COFFEES a day

…and we’re nowhere close to done.

Since we embarked on our mission, brands that millions of you have in your bag have invested MILLIONS in their R&D and product development based on our testing.

Ultimately - trying to make a better product for the folks who really matter.

You.

In 2024 there will be more factory inspections, more brands tested and more community outreach than ever…and it doesn’t stop there.

We’re glad you’re here.

Welcome aboard.

videos.title: 7 Moves That Fix Your Entire Body (GUARANTEED)
videos.summary_source_text:
7 Moves That Fix Your Entire Body (GUARANTEED) You do not lose the ability to move well just because you get older. You lose it because you stop practicing the movement patterns your body was built to perform.

In this video, Jeff Cavaliere breaks down seven primitive movement patterns that are essential for strength, mobility, balance, coordination, and long-term physical function. He also shows you one exercise for each pattern that can help you move better, feel younger, and keep your body capable as the years go by.

22 Days To Double Your Pullups - http://athleanx.com/morepullups
Subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

Most workouts focus only on building muscle or burning calories. Those goals matter, but they are only part of what your body needs. If you want to change your body and fix the movement problems that make you feel stiff, weak, unstable, or older than you are, you also need to train the fundamental patterns behind everyday human movement.

Those patterns include squatting, hinging, walking, rotating, lunging, pushing, and pulling. When one begins to disappear, you may lose mobility, struggle to get down to the floor, become less stable, or find that simple movements take more effort.

The first exercise is the chimp squat, a deep squat variation that challenges the hips, adductors, ankles and knees while teaching you to shift your weight from side to side. A functional squat requires the shin to move forward and the ankle to dorsiflex. Avoiding that motion does not protect your knees. Losing the ability to control it is what creates limitations.

Next is the sweeping hinge. The wide stance makes it easier to push the hips backward instead of folding through the lower back. As you sweep toward the floor and reach overhead, you reinforce the hip hinge, stretch the hamstrings and adductors, and finish each rep by contracting the glutes. The ability to hinge safely is involved in lifting, bending, carrying, and picking objects up from the ground.

The relay trains gait, single-leg stability, hip control, and the natural coordination of the opposite arm and leg. Moving slowly exposes weaknesses that faster movement can hide. The goal is to control the knee, load the hip, reach with the arms, and maintain balance throughout the movement.

Rotation is trained with the solar twist. A rigid torso can make balance more difficult and reduce your ability to react when you stumble or change direction. By allowing the arms, spine, hips, and feet to work together, this movement restores the twisting pattern that many people stop using. Maintaining rotation gives you more freedom of movement and better three-dimensional control.

The sweeping lunge brings you closer to the floor while using your hands for support. This makes it an accessible way to work on deep hip flexion, hamstring flexibility, adductor mobility, ankle mobility, and lateral lunging. Start with the range you can control, then gradually move deeper.

For the upper body push, Jeff uses the tracker pushup. This exercise combines chest, shoulder, and triceps strength with hip mobility and shoulder range of motion. It can be performed from the toes or modified from the knees. The goal is to preserve your ability to push while allowing the rest of your body to move with it.

The final movement is the Clark Kent, a floor-based pulling exercise that targets the upper back, rear shoulders, and rotator cuff without equipment. By driving the elbows into the floor, lifting the upper back, and externally rotating the shoulders, you train muscles that often become weak from sitting, poor posture, and too much emphasis on pushing exercises.

Together, these seven exercises create a complete movement routine that can be done in a small space with no gym equipment. Use them as a morning mobility routine, a warmup before training, an active recovery session, or a standalone longevity workout.

This is not about performing flashy mobility drills. It is about keeping the physical skills that allow you to squat, bend, walk, rotate, lunge, push, and pull without fear or restriction. These qualities help you stay independent, athletic, and confident.

If you have been searching for the best exercise for longevity, how to feel younger, how to improve mobility, how to fix your body, or how to move better as you age, start with the patterns that human movement is built on. You do not need a complicated routine. You need consistent exposure to the movements your body has been missing.

For complete workout programs created by physical therapist Jeff Cavaliere, visit ATHLEANX.com. Whether you want to build muscle, increase strength, improve athleticism, reduce movement limitations, or change your body, ATHLEAN-X gives you a step-by-step plan to train smarter.

If you found this video helpful, leave a comment with the movement that challenged you most. Subscribe to ATHLEAN-X and turn on notifications so you never miss a new workout,  mobility routine, or training breakdown. You do not lose the ability to move well just because you get older. videos.title: What's Inside The Titleist Tour Truck? (The Open Special)
videos.summary_source_text:
What's Inside The Titleist Tour Truck? (The Open Special) Guy gets exclusive access inside the Titleist Tour Truck at The 2026 Open Championship, discovering how the team builds, tweaks and prepares clubs for the world’s best golfers.


Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: 🚨 Nobody Is Safe
videos.summary_source_text:
🚨 Nobody Is Safe PHLY Flyers' Charlie O'Connor joins the DLLS Stars crew to break down one of the busiest offseasons in the NHL.

The crew dives into the Philadelphia Flyers' offseason moves, the massive offer sheet to Leo Carlsson and what it means for the rest of the league, plus the latest on Jason Robertson's contract negotiations with the Dallas Stars. Charlie shares his insight on how teams are navigating the salary cap, the growing trend of aggressive offer sheets, and whether the Stars and Robertson can find common ground before the situation drags on any longer. Lose 5 lbs FAST! (Here’s How) Want to lose 5 pounds fast? One meal a day (OMAD) may be one of the fastest ways to do it.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/44lpRJh

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

The schedule:
• Finish your last meal by 6:00 p.m.
• No snacks after dinner
• Sleep through the night
• Skip breakfast and lunch the next day
• Eat your next meal around 6:00 p.m.

A 23-hour fast can help you burn stored fat for fuel, reduce cravings, decrease appetite, and lose excess fluid.

videos.title: Is USA HP less than German HP? Mustang v M4 DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Is USA HP less than German HP? Mustang v M4 DRAG RACE We’re drag racing a supercharged Ford Mustang against a tuned BMW M4 over the quarter-mile and half-mile. We’ll also compare the two in a brake test from 100mph. 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-16-07

It’s time for a USA vs Germany drag race! 

We’ve got Mat in a Ford Mustang, and he’s going up against a BMW M4!

However, this is no ordinary Mustang - it’s been tuned by Clive Sutton and fitted with a supercharger! So let’s take a closer look at the stats… 

The base spec Mustang is powered by a 5-litre naturally-aspirated V8 that produces 453hp and 540Nm. However, this one’s been fitted with a supercharger and a new exhaust, and it now produces 800hp and 870Nm! This power is sent to the rear wheels only via a 6-speed manual, and it weighs in at 1,812kg. The full cost of the car, including the upgrades, is £165,000. 

Then we come to the F82 BMW M4. The standard M4 comes with a 4-litre twin-turbo inline six that produces 450hp and 550Nm. However, the car we have here has had an ECU and DCT tune, and as a result, it now produces 550hp and 750Nm. Power is sent to the rear wheels only via a 7-speed dual-clutch, and the car tips the scales at 1,537kg. 

So the Mustang is well up on power, but could the weight difference, coupled with the manual gearbox, prove decisive? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

Thanks to everyone who helped set up this race:
- Ford Mustang: https://www.instagram.com/clivesutton/
- BMW M4: https://www.instagram.com/morebhpltd/ We’re drag racing a supercharged Ford Mustang against a tuned BMW M4 over the quarter-mile and half-mile. We’ll also compare the two in a brake test from 100mph.

videos.title: How To Transition From Backswing To Downswing In The Golf Swing (In Detail)
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Transition From Backswing To Downswing In The Golf Swing (In Detail) In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno shows high handicap golfers how hip and leg motion in the backswing creates a flowing transition and better ball striking.

⏱️ Timestamps:
🔍 0:00 - Eric Cogorno: how hip and leg motion connects the backswing and downswing
💡 2:14 - Why high handicap golfers treat the backswing and downswing as two separate events
📐 3:04 - How leg flex and foot flare control hip turn and tilt in the backswing
💪 5:10 - Trail leg extension: how much flex to lose and why it matters
⛳ 8:04 - Trail hip to the midline: the backswing checkpoint that sets up the downswing
🔄 10:08 - How the hips start moving toward the target before the backswing is finished
🏆 12:35 - Downswing checkpoint: tailbone past the midline at the finish
🎯 15:41 - Belt buckle forward drill: how to feel the correct hip motion through the ball

If you treat your backswing and downswing as two separate events, this golf instruction lesson will change how you think about your golf swing. Eric Cogorno and Steve Sieracki break down the ground-up sequence — leg flex, trail hip to the midline, hips flowing forward — that separates the best ball strikers from high handicap golfers. Watch how PGA Tour Pro Tommy Fleetwood uses this exact hip and leg motion to create one of the most coordinated, flowing transitions in professional golf — and how these high handicap golf tips give any golfer the same checkpoints to work from. Getting this sequence right gives you better contact, more power, and a more inside-out swing path. If you leave this video without trying the belt buckle forward drill, you're leaving consistency and distance on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why high handicap golfers treat the backswing and downswing as two separate events — and how to fix it
• How foot flare and leg flex control hip turn and tilt during the backswing
• How much trail leg flex to lose during the backswing and why it matters for golf instruction
• The trail hip to midline checkpoint: where your trail hip should be at the top of the swing
• How PGA Tour Pro Tommy Fleetwood uses hip and leg motion to create a flowing backswing to downswing transition
• Why the hips start moving toward the target before the backswing is finished
• The belt buckle forward drill for feeling correct hip motion through the ball
• How correct hip and leg motion creates an inside-out swing path for less pulls and fades

videos.title: The #1 Secret to Activating Your Cancer-Killing Cells
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Secret to Activating Your Cancer-Killing Cells Vitamin D deficiency can cause more health issues than most people realize. Discover the surprising connection between vitamin D and your immune system, and why maintaining healthy vitamin D levels is so important.

0:00 The real purpose of vitamin D3 
0:42 Vitamin D and the immune system
2:09 Autoimmune diseases
2:23 Vitamin D, gut health, and immune system support
2:50 The immune system and stress
4:29 Vitamin D receptor resistance
4:50 The Coimbra Protocol
6:43 Cod liver oil, sun exposure, and vitamin D
8:05 Vitamin K2, magnesium, and zinc

🌟Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/3TiFFKz

Check out Dr. Coimbra's full interview here: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/cmPEA0EWd7g

Keep watching to learn more about the connection between sunlight and vitamin D: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/AoUmVgPozSE
▶️ https://youtu.be/Sn7T46fCjLE 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Can you take too much vitamin D? Find out here:
https://drbrg.co/4bNCctR

Find a Coimbra Protocol provider here:
https://www.hsctstopsms.com/simple-overview-of-coimbra-vitamin-d-protocol/list-of-coimbra-protocol-doctors-worldwide/ 

Autoimmune diseases are becoming increasingly common, but what’s driving this trend?

Vitamin D’s most important role is helping regulate the immune system. Your immune system protects against viruses, fungi, yeast, bacteria, and abnormal cells, while also helping distinguish between healthy and unhealthy cells. Every major immune cell involved in this process depends on vitamin D.

Rather than simply creating a stronger immune system, vitamin D helps support normal immune function and a balanced immune response. Vitamin D is especially important for the immune cells in your gut, where a large portion of the body’s immune system resides.

Some people with adequate vitamin D levels still develop autoimmune diseases. Chronic stress is one factor that may influence immune function by increasing cortisol, which can suppress the immune system. Low vitamin D levels combined with chronic stress may further affect immune function.

Around 25% of people have vitamin D receptor resistance, which can affect how their bodies respond to vitamin D. This may help explain why some people require more vitamin D than others.

DATA: 
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7812338/
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7720099/ 
https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0031938424002828

Dr. Eric Berg D.C. Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

Follow Me On Social Media:
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Drberg/

Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/drericberg/ 

Spotify Podcast: 🎧 https://drbrg.co/DrBerg-Spotify

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@drbergofficial 

X: https://x.com/dr_ericberg

Disclaimer: 
Dr. Eric Berg D.C. received his Doctor of Chiropractic degree from Palmer College of Chiropractic in 1988. His use of “doctor” or “Dr.” in relation to himself solely refers to that degree. Dr. Berg is a licensed chiropractor in Virginia, California, and Louisiana, but he no longer practices chiropractic in any state and does not see patients, so he can focus on educating people as a full-time activity, yet he maintains an active license. This video is for general informational purposes only. It should not be used to self-diagnose, and it is not a substitute for a medical exam, cure, treatment, diagnosis, prescription, or recommendation. It does not create a doctor-patient relationship between Dr. Berg and you. You should not make any change in your health regimen or diet before first consulting a physician and obtaining a medical exam, diagnosis, and recommendation. Always seek the advice of a physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.

*Dr. Eric Berg, DC, is not AI-generated. AI-enhanced elements may be used in this video for production purposes only.
