👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.title: Bob MacIntyre's Full Range Session | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Bob MacIntyre's Full Range Session | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Robert MacIntyre's full range session from the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

videos.title: Cutter Gauthier Wants A Piece Of The Carlsson Pie In Anaheim | GS Off Ice OffSzn w/ Zach Cavanagh
videos.summary_source_text:
Cutter Gauthier Wants A Piece Of The Carlsson Pie In Anaheim | GS Off Ice OffSzn w/ Zach Cavanagh Welcome back to a special league-wide edition of Guerilla Sports Off Ice! 

Leo Carlsson's $90M offer-sheet continues to be arguably the biggest news of the NHL offseason. Now that the Ducks have offically matched Philly’s offer and have the contract on their books, what does it mean for Anaheim? Rumors are circulating that Cutter Gauthier won’t take a penny less than Leo’s new contract. Will the Ducks be able to shake their new contract issues? Or is this the start of a downfall in SoCal?

We’re joined on the episode by a very special guest, Zach Cavanagh! Zach is an Anaheim Ducks reporter for The Sporting Tribune, host of the ‘Ducks in Deep’ Podcast and a member of the Anaheim Chapter of the PHWA. Zach gives his inside perspective on the Leo Carlsson contract situation, how the Ducks community is reacting to matching the offer-sheet, and his understanding of how Anaheim will tackle their cap situation now that they have an NHL record-breaking contract on their books.

After chatting with Zach, Mark Robinson is joined by Michael Gurzhiev, a senior creative at Guerilla Sports, who is pinch-hitting for Jesse Montano while he’s out on vacation. Mark and Michael overview a handful of topics, and close things out with a fun game.

🏒Steve Yzerman STEPS DOWN as Red Wings GM 
🏒Macklin Celebrini on cover of NHL 27
🏒NHL opening day release
🏒Hurricanes and Panther opening 2026-27 season
🏒Avs home-opener vs. Kings AGAIN???

#nhl #hockey #nhlhockeytalk #nationalhockeyleague #hockeypodcast #sportspodcast #sportstalk #anaheimducks #leocarlsson #cuttergauthier #ducks #anaheimhockey

videos.title: 15.07.26 - Prediction Markets Deep Dive: Risk, Strategy & the Future of Financial Intelligence
videos.summary_source_text:
15.07.26 - Prediction Markets Deep Dive: Risk, Strategy & the Future of Financial Intelligence Welcome to the continuation of our RIFT Before You Quit Bonus Series, where we continue our deep dive into one of the most exciting innovations in modern finance—Prediction Markets.

In this episode, we move beyond the basics and explore how professional traders, institutions, and intelligent financial systems evaluate uncertainty through probability-driven markets. We also explain how Hyperliquid's HIP-4 infrastructure provides the foundation for RIFT's prediction market ecosystem, delivering a fast, transparent, and scalable environment for trading real-world outcomes.

Unlike traditional financial markets that focus solely on asset prices, prediction markets allow participants to trade the probability of future events. Every contract represents a clearly defined outcome, and understanding the exact wording of that contract is one of the most important skills for any participant.

In this episode you'll discover:

- Why contract wording matters in prediction markets
- The difference between similar-looking contracts that produce completely different outcomes
- How event definitions, timestamps and settlement rules determine the value of a prediction contract
- Why professional traders always read the full contract before entering a position
- Understanding market-implied probability versus personal probability estimates

We then move into one of the most important educational sections of the series—risk management within prediction markets.

You'll learn about the major categories of risk that every participant should understand, including:

• Forecasting Risk

• Liquidity Risk

• Resolution Risk

• Oracle Risk

• Platform Risk

• Regulatory Risk

• Behavioural Risk

• Correlation Risk

Each risk is explained using practical examples, including sporting events, cryptocurrency markets, macroeconomic announcements, and real-world trading scenarios.

The episode also explores how liquidity influences pricing, why some contracts experience greater volatility than others, and how large market participants can temporarily influence market pricing through capital flows.

Another major focus is professional decision-making.

Rather than simply guessing outcomes, experienced participants follow a structured framework that includes:

Reading the complete contract
Understanding settlement rules
Estimating probabilities
Comparing market pricing
Assessing liquidity
Position sizing
Monitoring developing information
Reviewing results after settlement

These principles form the foundation of disciplined participation and help separate probability-based decision making from emotional speculation.

Throughout the session, we also explain how RIFT simplifies many of these processes by leveraging Hyperliquid's infrastructure to provide users with a streamlined prediction market experience.

The discussion then expands into the broader future of prediction markets and their potential applications far beyond trading.

Topics include:

Financial market forecasting
Corporate decision making
Economic research
Public policy
Artificial intelligence
Organisational risk management
Information discovery
Probability-based forecasting systems

One of the key takeaways from this episode is that prediction markets are not designed to predict the future with certainty.

Instead, they create transparent, financially incentivised systems where different opinions compete through market pricing. As new information becomes available, probabilities adjust dynamically, creating a live representation of collective market expectations.

The episode also explains why a market price should never be confused with a guarantee. A contract trading at a 70% probability is not promising that an event will happen—it simply reflects the current consensus based on available information.

By understanding probability, liquidity, pricing, settlement, and behavioural psychology, traders can make more informed decisions while avoiding many of the emotional mistakes that affect traditional market participants.

In this episode you'll learn:

✅ Why contract wording matters

✅ Market-implied probability explained

✅ The major risks of prediction markets

✅ Professional analysis frameworks

✅ Position sizing and capital preservation

✅ Liquidity and execution

✅ Behavioural psychology in prediction trading

✅ AI and the future of probability markets

✅ How RIFT leverages Hyperliquid's HIP-4 infrastructure

✅ Why prediction markets may become a core layer of tomorrow's financial system

The episode concludes with a preview of the next instalment, where we begin exploring Hyperliquid HIP-4 in detail, including fully collateralised outcome contracts, binary and multi-outcome markets, how prediction markets differ from perpetual futures, the RIFT prediction interface, and how prediction markets fit into RIFT's wider ecosystem and future capital participation framework. videos.title: Hindi - 15.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 15.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

videos.title: How To Get Better At Hockey In Between Practices
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Get Better At Hockey In Between Practices Ever notice you play better when you're on the ice with better players? There's a real reason for that and it's because your brain has cells called mirror neurons.

When you watch someone perform a skill, your motor cortex fires a version of the same pattern they're using. You're not moving, but your brain is running the rep. Researchers call it action observation training, and it's used everywhere from pro sports to physical rehab.

Here's why this matters for hockey players specifically: you can't train all day. Ice time is limited, your body needs recovery, and most of your week happens away from the rink. But your brain can keep learning the whole time.

That's why studying the best players is a core part of how we train at Train 2.0. Not casually watching hockey. The mechanics, patterns, the timing, the details most people skip past.

On-ice reps build the skill and studying the best primes it. The players who do both make the biggest improvements in their games.

Anthropic is warning that AI could destroy jobs, expand surveillance, increase inequality, improve itself, and potentially escape human control. But the company is still racing to build the same technology while admitting that stopping alone may be impossible.

videos.title: Top Coach gives me a playing lesson around Minnesota's #1 Course
videos.summary_source_text:
Top Coach gives me a playing lesson around Minnesota's #1 Course What if the reason you aren't shooting lower scores has nothing to do with your golf swing?

In this video, I spend 9 holes at the incredible Interlachen Country Club (Minnesota's #1 ranked course according to Golf Digest) with golf performance coach Dr. Luke Benoit to learn how better golfers actually think on the golf course. We talk course management, decision making, motor learning, practice habits, tournament pressure, and why trying to fix your swing during a round is one of the biggest mistakes golfers make.

If you've ever felt like your range game doesn't show up on the course, this conversation could completely change how you play.

In this video you'll learn:
• Why swing thoughts may or may not help on the course
• How elite golfers make better decisions before every shot
• The difference between practicing golf and playing golf
• How to account for sloped lies
• Why and how to improve your lag putting
• Why tee shot locations make no sense at times
• Should you draw or fade in certain situations?

Whether you're trying to break 100, 90, 80, or finally reach scratch, these lessons will help you think about golf in a completely different way.

https://www.youtube.com/@golfwell

videos.title: Patrick Kane Punch Progression
videos.summary_source_text:
Patrick Kane Punch Progression The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

At almost 40 years old, he’s still scoring highlight reel goals and leading his team on historic runs.

In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains why extra virgin olive oil has become one of the most studied foods in nutrition research. Learn about its naturally occurring compounds, including polyphenols, how it fits into a Mediterranean-style eating pattern, and why so many people choose it as part of a healthy lifestyle. You'll also learn why extra virgin olive oil is different from highly refined oils and simple ways to include it in your daily routine. This video is for educational purposes only and is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. 🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4fJQrTx

videos.title: The Grip Mistake Most Golfers Make Before They Swing
videos.summary_source_text:
The Grip Mistake Most Golfers Make Before They Swing ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=15.07.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=15.07.26

Most golfers think about where their hands go on the club, but very few think about when and where they actually build their grip.

In this video, we show you why setting your grip with the club already on the ground can make it harder to get the club sitting correctly in your hands, and why building your grip in the air gives you a much better chance of starting with control, consistency and confidence.

If your grip often feels uncomfortable, uncertain, or slightly different from shot to shot, this simple change could make a big difference.
You’ll learn:

- Why gripping the club on the ground can cause problems
- How to build your grip before you set the club down
- What to look for in both hands
- How to create a repeatable grip routine before every shot

Try this before your next round and see how much more organised your setup feels.

videos.summary_source_text:
91-Year-Old Pitmaster Serves Adam Richman the Best BBQ in Texas | Pro Moves Located an hour outside of Austin in the town of Lexington, Snow's BBQ is widely considered one of the best barbecue joints in all of Texas. People travel from miles away, and camp out in their cars, in order to be first in line at Snow's every Saturday morning. And while crowds undoubtedly gather to watch the legendary 91-year-old pitmaster Tootsie Tomanetz at work, keeping Snow's running is a team effort. 

On this special episode of Pro Moves, host Adam Richman samples some of Ms. Tootsie's famous barbecue chicken and pork steak, but also meets with Snow's owner Kerry Bexley and pitmaster Clay Cowgill to see how all the magic is made.

videos.title: GPT-5.6 EXPOSED: OpenAI's Biggest AI Upgrade or Biggest Risk Yet?
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-5.6 EXPOSED: OpenAI's Biggest AI Upgrade or Biggest Risk Yet? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Is GPT-5.6 really the biggest leap OpenAI has ever made?

This New Golf Swing Technique Made Him Look Like A Tour  Pro #shorts #golfswing #golf #ericcogorno #shorts 

In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno fixes pulls and fades — and gets a golfer drawing the ball in five minutes.

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS
Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

⭐ OUR AWESOME PARTNERS AND DISCOUNT CODES ⭐
🏌️ Takomo Golf Clubs - https://takomogolf.com
👕 Bobby Jones Apparel: https://bobbyjones.com/COGORNO
Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF

Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF
🎯 Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
⛳ theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

If you struggle with pulls, over fades, or weak shots to the right, these high handicap golf tips are going to change how you think about your setup and downswing. In this golf instruction lesson, Eric Cogorno works with a student fighting a steep over-the-top move and fixes his miss pattern in minutes — the student was drawing the ball within five minutes of making two simple changes. The fix starts with closing the shoulder line at setup and adding right side depth in the backswing. These golf drills can be practiced at the range immediately and apply to any golfer who wants to stop pulling it left and start swinging from the inside. If you leave this video without trying the closed shoulder drill, you're leaving distance and consistency on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why an open shoulder line at setup causes a steep downswing and pull fades
• How closing the shoulder line at setup automatically shallows the swing path
• High handicap golf tips for eliminating pulls and weak fades with two setup changes
• The alignment stick drill for training the correct follow through direction
• How to feel the right shoulder tuck and correct lead forearm position at setup
• The halfway back to arms parallel drill for training face rotation through impact
• Why a deeper right-side turn in the backswing makes inside-out golf instruction feel natural
• How to take the same golf swing feels to driver for more distance and less weak right shots

videos.title: Wyndham Clark: "This Putter Changed My Career"
videos.summary_source_text:
Wyndham Clark: "This Putter Changed My Career" It's The Open and Wyndham Clark joins us to talk through the new PING putter that helped him claim his second major title.

He explains why he made the switch, what he looks for in a putter, and what gives him confidence on the greens when the pressure is at its highest.


Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: UNFILTERED (Featuring Rory McIlroy & Scottie Scheffler) | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open
videos.summary_source_text:
UNFILTERED (Featuring Rory McIlroy & Scottie Scheffler) | 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Behind the scenes from the Genesis Scottish Open featuring Rory McIlroy, Tommy Fleetwood, Scottie Scheffler and more!

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: Your Body Is Not the Enemy
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Body Is Not the Enemy So much suffering comes not only from pain, tension, or limitation — but from feeling like your own body has become the enemy.
When you’ve been struggling for a long time, it makes sense that you may try to fix, correct, control, or battle your body.
But sometimes the deepest shift begins when that fight starts to soften.
In this video, I explore what changes when you stop treating your body like a problem to defeat, and I guide you through a short somatic reflection to begin relating to your body differently.
If this speaks deeply to where you are right now, you’re welcome to schedule a Zoom call with me here: https://calendly.com/taroiwamoto/45min

Free Somatic Masterclass — Move More Freely in Your Body
Watch here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

Read my new book:
Your Body Is Not Broken: A Gentle Somatic Path to Moving with More Ease, Trust, and Freedom
A short Kindle book for anyone tired of trying to fix their body and wanting a gentler way to begin again.
https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GX363HMX

If you feel ready for deeper, more structured support, you can learn more about my course here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

videos.title: If I Had Cancer, This Is What I Would Do
videos.summary_source_text:
If I Had Cancer, This Is What I Would Do If I were diagnosed with cancer tomorrow, here’s exactly what I would do. I would focus on targeting cancer from a metabolic perspective using prolonged fasting, strategic nutrition, and multiple complementary approaches rather than relying on a single strategy.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/3R7cnxY

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

What I would focus on:
• Prolonged fasting based on the stage and severity
• Eating foods that align with an anticancer approach, including cruciferous vegetables, fermented foods, and polyphenol-rich compounds such as sulforaphane, quercetin, resveratrol, and berberine
• Supporting metabolic health and mitochondrial function
• Considering ivermectin and fenbendazole because of their proposed effects on metabolic pathways and parasite-like survival mechanisms

I’m not claiming any of these are cures; I’m simply sharing what I would personally do if I were facing a cancer diagnosis.

#cancer #fasting #metabolichealth #mitochondria #ketosis #sulforaphane #berberine #ivermectin #fenbendazole #healtheducation

videos.title: Best Home Run Derby Ever? + Peyton Watson Problems Loom For Nuggets | After The Horn Ep 57
videos.summary_source_text:
Best Home Run Derby Ever? + Peyton Watson Problems Loom For Nuggets | After The Horn Ep 57 Welcome back to Episode 57 of ‘After The Horn’ with Woody Paige, Tom Green, and Ron Zappolo!

On this week's episode, Woody, Ron, and Tom kick off the program with a hilarious segment surrounding the man who was launched 8 feet into the air by a bison in Yellowstone. Thankfully, the individual is okay, despite suffering a few injuries. The guys watch back the crazy footage of the incident and even find some sports parallels to the viral clip.

After a few good laughs in the opening minutes, the guys transition into baseball talk, specifically surrounding the Rockies and the All-Star break. The Rockies are continuing to make "the bad kind of history" in that they have been in last place in their division prior to the All-Star break in consecutive years. Despite this disappointing reality, the MLB All-Star break has already brought excitement to baseball fans in the form of a Home Run Derby that Woody claims may be the best ever.

The NBA offseason continues to coast along, but the Nuggets have made almost no moves. Despite recently signing former EuroLeague Defensive Player of the Year Alpha Diallo, it still feels like a major trade needs to happen. The Nuggets are shopping sign-and-trade options for Peyton Watson, which also means we could see the young forward leave Denver after a breakout season. How much longer will the Nuggets stay quiet, and if they do decide to make a move, what will it be?

LeBron James rumors continue to heat up despite him leaving Denver, it feels like the Broncos are getting more confident as the season approaches, and the FIFA World Cup is once again looking to be a smashing success during its quadrennial appearance. Woody, Ron, and Tom have thoughts on all of it.

Tune into ‘After The Horn’ on Tuesdays at 5:00 PM MST to hear hot takes, stories, and share laughs with three Denver sports legends. Stream ‘After The Horn’ wherever you get your podcasts, and on X, YouTube, and Facebook @ Guerilla Sports.

Powered by: redbirdfarms.com | @redbirdchicken

videos.title: The #1 MOST Dangerous Breakfast in America (That You Think Is Healthy)
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 MOST Dangerous Breakfast in America (That You Think Is Healthy) Most people think this breakfast food is healthy, but it’s actually one of the worst breakfast foods you could eat. Discover the worst breakfast foods for your health and the healthiest breakfast to eat instead.

0:00 The worst breakfast foods
0:21 Whole-grain cereal
2:16 Whole wheat side effects
2:51 Phytic acid
3:27 Gut inflammation and whole grain cereals 
6:44 What is the best breakfast?
8:29 No breakfast benefits
9:20 Protein breakfast

🌟 Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4ffXUrA

Learn more about blood sugar, healthy eating, and the hidden foods that may be harming your health:
▶️ https://youtu.be/ZKAH3GGq2cg
▶️ https://youtu.be/rIgXXXsL69s
▶️ https://youtu.be/H0SE-_unHQ0

Check out this article for a deep dive on the benefits of intermittent fasting and a comprehensive guide on how it's done: https://drbrg.co/4hegjYd

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Whole-grain cereals, such as oats, are often promoted as a healthy breakfast. Whole-grain oats are commonly associated with lowering cholesterol, but you need over 4 servings to make just a small change. This causes a significant blood sugar spike.

Whole wheat cereals made from modern wheat can raise blood sugar more than many people realize. Starting your day with a high-starch breakfast may contribute to blood sugar fluctuations, sugar cravings, and increased hunger later in the day.

The best breakfast may be no breakfast at all! If you reduce sugar and starch intake and stop snacking, you may find you’re no longer hungry in the morning. Extending your overnight fast can help support metabolic health. 

Keep it simple: eat when you’re hungry, not because it’s breakfast time.

DATA:
https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2009/01/090112130653.htm
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3705319/

Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: How to find your PERFECT golf shaft 👀
videos.summary_source_text:
How to find your PERFECT golf shaft 👀 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: TALKIN' PROSPECTS! 2 Carolina Hurricanes Prospects Make Latest Top 100 List
videos.summary_source_text:
TALKIN' PROSPECTS! 2 Carolina Hurricanes Prospects Make Latest Top 100 List On Tuesday, July 14, The Athletic's Scott Wheeler dropped his Top 100 NHL Drafted Prospects list for Summer 2026. Regarding the Carolina Hurricanes,  they had only two players make the Top 100, with a third just missing out as one of the last few to be cut. That said, do their placements make sense, and should there have been another one or two within the organization to be on the list? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes,  Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on Bradly Nadeau making the list in the Tier 4 range at the 56th spot. Does what Wheeler said about Nadeau make sense, or is he off? Plus, should Nadeau be higher on the list and in a different tier? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on Ivan Ryabkin making the Tier 6 range at the 98th spot. Should he be higher, or is he in the right spot according to Wheeler? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on how Felix Unger-Sorum just missed out on the Top 100. Should he have been on the list, or did missing out make sense? Plus, who else within the Hurricanes organization has a case to make the Top 100 list? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

🎧 https://link.chtbl.com/LOCarolinaHurricanes?sid=YouTube

Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on how Felix Unger-Sorum just missed out on the Top 100. Should he have been on the list, or did missing out make sense? Plus, who else within the Hurricanes organization has a case to make the Top 100 list? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Who’s the TOUGHEST 4x4 EVER! Toyota v Land Rover v Mercedes
videos.summary_source_text:
Who’s the TOUGHEST 4x4 EVER! Toyota v Land Rover v Mercedes We’re testing three second-hand SUVs over a series of challenges on an off-road course to see which offers the best value for its £2,000 price tag. 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1007

We’ve got our hands on three second-hand SUVs, each valued at less than £2,000, and we’re going to see whether they can survive over a series of off-road challenges! 

We’ve got a Land Rover Discovery 3 from 2005, a Mercedes ML from 2005, and a Toyota Land Cruiser from 2002! 

But will they be able to survive these extreme off-road challenges?! Let’s see what each car is working with…

Starting with the Discovery 3, it’s powered by a 2.7-litre V6 that produces 190hp and 440Nm. It’s equipped with a 6-speed manual and weighs 2,419kg. It was first released in 2005, we bought it for £1,500, and it currently has 256,000 miles on the clock. 

Up next is the Mercedes ML. There’s a 2.7-litre inline-5 turbo diesel under the bonnet, and this produces 163hp and 400Nm. It’s equipped with a 5-speed automatic gearbox, weighs around 2,100kg, and was released in 2005. We bought it for £1,800, and it has 140,000 miles on the clock. 

Finally, we come to the Land Cruiser. It’s powered by a 4.7-litre V8, and this puts down 235hp and 434Nm. It rolls up with a 4-speed automatic gearbox, and it weighs 2,260kg. It was originally released in 2002, and although it was originally bought for £5,000, it’s only worth around £2,000 now. To date, it’s run around 282,000 miles.

So which do you think will come out on top? And more importantly, will any of the cars even make it to the end of this video?! Stick with Mat, Sam & Nick to see for yourself! videos.title: 14.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
14.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: Rotowire: Nathan MacKinnon and the Colorado Avalanche Are Not Well Liked
videos.summary_source_text:
Rotowire: Nathan MacKinnon and the Colorado Avalanche Are Not Well Liked Colorado Avalanche emerge as one of the NHL’s most hated teams, but does that animosity fuel their dominance in the Central Division? Nathan MacKinnon’s polarizing reputation surprises even die-hard fans, ranking him among the league’s most disliked players according to Rotowire’s new map breakdown. Meanwhile, the Avalanche secure a one-year deal with Fabian Lysell—can this "prove-it" contract ignite his potential and bolster Colorado’s bottom-six forward group?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson dissect Rotowire’s rankings for most hated teams, players, and loyal fanbases, revealing surprising rivalries and unexpected grudges across the league. They explore why Vegas Golden Knights top the villain charts, which players get under fans’ skin, and how Colorado’s passionate fanbase stacks up nationwide. The hosts wrap with a look at the New York Islanders’ innovative fan-designed third jersey contest. Can other NHL franchises match this level of engagement?

 Isaiah J. Downing-Imagn Images

videos.title: Kamaru Usman On Facing Du Plessis + Fight Week Emotions + Learning To Control Fear | Closed Course
videos.summary_source_text:
Kamaru Usman On Facing Du Plessis + Fight Week Emotions + Learning To Control Fear | Closed Course Welcome back to another episode of Closed Course!

This week's special guest is former undisputed UFC Welterweight Champion Kamaru Usman, who owns a 21-4 MMA record. With nine wins by knockout, one by submission, and 11 by decision, he's earned the nickname "The Nigerian Nightmare." He's stepping into the Octagon in Oklahoma City this weekend, but before then, we've got him in studio for an action-packed interview that you won't want to miss.

With a fight coming up this weekend against Dricus Du Plessis, Usman discusses the emotions that come with fight week and the thoughts that race through his mind as he prepares to step into the Octagon. He also shares his broader mindset as a fighter and explains how training differs from the actual fight. For Usman, training places a heavy emphasis on the physical aspects of fighting, but once fight night arrives, it becomes almost entirely mental. He takes a deep dive into how he's developed that mindset over time and fine-tuned both his physical and mental preparation throughout his career.

Usman also dives into some other intriguing topics, including how he controls fear, his biggest rivalries, the role of trash talk in the UFC, his personal and family life, and his journey into the game of golf.

Check out Kamaru Usman’s podcast, “Pound 4 Pound” co-hosted with Henry Cejudo, talking everything combat sports

videos.title: 7 AI Conspiracies That Turn Out To Be Real (AI Myth Busters Ep01)
videos.summary_source_text:
7 AI Conspiracies That Turn Out To Be Real (AI Myth Busters Ep01) Five AI conspiracies sound completely ridiculous until you look at the evidence. In the first episode of AI Myth Busters, we investigate thirteen claims involving ChatGPT, OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, AI detectors, privacy, bot traffic, model collapse, data centers, and the future of work.
Did ChatGPT really start slacking off in December? Does every prompt consume a bottle of water? Can an em dash expose AI-written text? Did Claude actually blackmail someone to avoid being shut down? Are your private ChatGPT conversations helping train future models? Some of these myths fall apart instantly. Others turn out to be disturbingly close to the truth.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com

📌 What You’ll See:
Claude, Gemini, GPT-4.1, Grok, and DeepSeek choose blackmail during simulated safety tests
SOURCE: https://www.anthropic.com/research/agentic-misalignment
Personal ChatGPT conversations may be used to improve future models unless users opt out
SOURCE: https://help.openai.com/en/articles/5722486-how-your-data-is-used-to-improve-model-performance
Bots generated 51% of all web traffic in 2024 and officially overtook humans
SOURCE: https://www.imperva.com/blog/2025-imperva-bad-bot-report-how-ai-is-supercharging-the-bot-threat/
Researchers discover model collapse when AI repeatedly trains on AI-generated content
SOURCE: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-024-07566-y
AI detectors flag human-written documents including the US Constitution as AI-generated
SOURCE: https://arstechnica.com/information-technology/2023/07/why-ai-detectors-think-the-us-constitution-was-written-by-ai/
Researchers test whether ChatGPT becomes less productive during December
SOURCE: https://arstechnica.com/information-technology/2023/12/is-chatgpt-becoming-lazier-because-its-december-people-run-tests-to-find-out/
The viral claim that every AI prompt consumes an entire bottle of water
SOURCE: https://news.ucr.edu/articles/2023/04/28/ai-programs-consume-large-volumes-scarce-water
OpenAI finally addresses ChatGPT’s infamous em dash writing habit
SOURCE: https://arstechnica.com/ai/2025/11/forget-agi-sam-altman-celebrates-chatgpt-finally-following-em-dash-formatting-rules/
AI could create 170 million jobs while displacing another 92 million by 2030
SOURCE: https://www.weforum.org/press/2025/01/future-of-jobs-report-2025-78-million-new-job-opportunities-by-2030-but-urgent-upskilling-needed-to-prepare-workforces/

🚨 Why It Matters
These are more than strange internet rumors. They expose real questions about AI privacy, safety, environmental costs, synthetic content, unreliable detection tools, and how little we still understand about advanced models.
AI is already changing what we read, how we communicate, and what people consider authentic human work. As bots and AI-generated content continue spreading across the internet, separating documented evidence from viral exaggeration becomes more important than ever.

videos.title: The Open Championship Preview, Picks to win at Royal Birkdale | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
The Open Championship Preview, Picks to win at Royal Birkdale | The Drop The Drop is gearing up for the final major of the 2026 season as the TOUR heads to Royal Birkdale and the 154th playing of The Open Championship. We’ll spend the first part of the show giving picks and predictions for who will be raising the Claret Jug on Sunday. The EliminaTOUR makes its final appearance of the year, using stats, trends and history to whittle the field down from the full entry list all the way down to one winner. Our host Alexandra O’Laughlin played Royal Birkdale a week ago and she provides some course logistics and things to look for as the event plays out. Later we are joined by Sky Sports lead golf presenter Nick Daugherty as he breaks down some of the key players and who he thinks will be in contention. Finally, we’ll react to the PGA TOUR announcement that Chasing Sunday – a behind-the-scenes collaboration between PGA TOUR Studios and NFL Films – will return during the week of the BMW Championship.

SUBSCRIBE to PGA TOUR now: http://pgat.us/vBxcZSh

videos.title: The Secret To Pulling The Puck Between Your Legs
videos.summary_source_text:
The Secret To Pulling The Puck Between Your Legs The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

The Official Trott Shop Tour THIS IS THE TROTT SHOP!! LET ME EXPLAIN EXACTLY HOW THE PROCESS WORKS.

Come take a tour with me around the facility that is The Trott Shop.

In this video I explain everything we offer at The Trott Shop and more importantly what to expect from your experience.

I recently added break out fitting sessions from the full bag isolating Wood Only, Iron Only, Wedge Only or Putter Only fittings.

I strongly believe teaching and fitting are intertwined, if you reserve a session with me then expect to leave with some key points that can help you get the most out of your new golf clubs.

At the conclusion of any fitting WE BUILD YOUR CLUBS ON LOCATION. 

As I explain in this video:

WE FIT FOR THE FUTURE OF YOUR GAME

NO MATTER WHAT YOUR LEVEL WE CAN TAKE CARE OF YOU

THIS IS AS CLOSE OF A TOUR EXPERIENCE THAT I COULD CREATE FOR CONSUMERS

If you want the peace of mind that your clubs are TOUR LEVEL , then dive into the booking link below.

Add any questions to the #comment section and #subscribe for more equipment content.

If you’re interested in taking your game to the next level come and visit me at  www.thetrott.shop to reserve your spot.

Come and see for yourself, The Trott Shop at La Valle Coastal Club. We offer the Tour fitting and build experience directly to golfers seeking the best.

Learn more: https://thetrott.shop

Book a Tour Fitting Experience: https://thetrott.shop/pages/bookings

Whether you need a full bag fitting, driver upgrade, or custom club build, we’ve got you covered.

Our in-house coach, Skyler Finnell, is a Grass League professional, former PGA Tour Latin America player, and resident instructor.

Book a lesson with Skyler: https://thetrott.shop/pages/bookings

Stay connected by subscribing to the Trottie Golf newsletter for new content, equipment releases, Tour insights, and more at: https://pages.trottiegolf.com/tourtrucktuesday-sign-up-form

1 cup (200 g) cooked chickpeas.
1/4 cup (30 g) protein powder. I use plant-based protein.
2 cups (300 g) frozen bananas.

videos.title: The Ugly Truth About Avocados (You Won’t Like It)
videos.summary_source_text:
The Ugly Truth About Avocados (You Won’t Like It) Your avocados and avocado oil may not be as healthy as you think. Artificial ripening and processing can affect the quality, flavor, and natural compounds found in both avocados and avocado oil.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4yiGjrD

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Things to consider:
• Many avocados are artificially ripened with ethylene gas before reaching grocery stores
• Artificial ripening may not allow the fruit to fully develop its natural flavor compounds and phytonutrients
• Refined and unrefined avocado oils can vary significantly in quality
• Processing methods such as refining and deodorization may contribute to oxidation, even if the oil no longer has an off-taste or smell
• Choosing naturally ripened avocados and minimally processed avocado oil may help preserve more of their natural flavor and beneficial compounds

#avocado #avocadooil #healthyfats #nutrition #phytonutrients #realfood #healthyeating #wellness #healthtips #foodquality

videos.title: What's in Min Woo Lee's Golf Bag? | The Open Special!
videos.summary_source_text:
What's in Min Woo Lee's Golf Bag? | The Open Special! In this video Guy Charnock and Kellen Watson take a look through Min Woo Lee's golf clubs ahead of the 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale. We even get a look at the brand new Odyssey TRTL putter! 

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Should You Exercise While Fasting?
videos.summary_source_text:
Should You Exercise While Fasting? Many people assume they should avoid exercise while fasting. This approach is just the opposite. Exercising in a fasted state is used to help preserve muscle while encouraging the body to burn stored fat. Instead of working against each other, fasting and exercise can be powerful tools when they're used together.

This is a clip from my conversation on The Primal Podcast. You can find the conversation on their channel or in the collaborations on my channel.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Aristotle Education and has been practicing medicine in Central Florida for over 35 years. He is also the founder and medical director of Cardiovascular Interventions, PA, where since 1990 he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor. Throughout his distinguished career, he has performed thousands of interventional procedures in both hospital and outpatient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease. videos.title: Try This Awesome AI Video Transition!
videos.summary_source_text:
Try This Awesome AI Video Transition! How to "Time Travel" in your next video with this SUPER easy editing trick!

You don't need complex VFX software to create seamless, mind-bending transitions anymore. Here is a straightforward way to jump between locations using AI tools like Runway, Kling, or Leonardo:

Step 1: Record your intro in Location A, then head to Location B. Try to wear the same outfit and match your pose at the start of the second clip—it makes the final transition much more believable.
Step 2: Take a screenshot of the very last frame of Clip A, and the very first frame of Clip B.
Step 3: Upload these two images as your starting and ending keyframes in an AI tool (I used Runway's Seedance 2.0 for the edit you see in this video).
Step 4: Use a prompt like this: “The camera shoots up like a big jump transition and reveals the second location in one smooth motion. The man does not speak.” (Pro-tip: Adding "does not speak" stops the AI from generating weird facial movements).
Step 5: Download the generated clip, place it between your two original videos, and apply a short crossfade or smooth cut to hide the seams.

This method works for teleporting, outfit changes, mic tosses, and more.

videos.title: One Vaping Device = Two Cartons of Cigarettes?!
videos.summary_source_text:
One Vaping Device = Two Cartons of Cigarettes?! Did you know that one vape is equal to 2 cartons of cigarettes? Discover the side effects of nicotine addiction, debunk common vaping myths, and learn the truth about vaping.

0:00 Is vaping bad for you? 
0:20 Vaping facts 
0:54 Nicotine addiction
2:03 Vaping myths
3:04 Are vapes water vapor? 
4:48 Vaping and dopamine

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4fxLtZg

Watch these next to learn more about overcoming addiction and supporting a healthy heart:
▶️ https://youtu.be/9ykPs8tberw
▶️ https://youtu.be/G1Z4703YstY

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

One vaping device can deliver the equivalent of hundreds of cigarette puffs. Many people don’t realize that the average vaping device contains about 650 mg of nicotine, making nicotine addiction easy to develop.

Flavorings used in vapes were never intended to be inhaled. When you vape, the aerosol enters your lungs and bloodstream, exposing your body to nicotine and other toxic compounds.

Every time you use a vape, your nicotine receptors become desensitized, increasing your craving for more nicotine over time. Nicotine is also a stimulant that constricts blood vessels, promotes inflammation, and can lead to chemical dependence.

One of the most common vaping myths is that vapes only contain water vapor. In reality, many vaping products contain solvents, glycerin, synthetic flavorings, formaldehyde, and other toxic byproducts in addition to nicotine.

DATA:
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12628669/ 
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11317248/  
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC10520052/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs

• Bryson DeChambeau

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access

• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

• Drivers

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

videos.title: 13.07.26 - Prediction Markets Explained: The Future of Trading Uncertainty with Hyperliquid HIP-4
videos.summary_source_text:
13.07.26 - Prediction Markets Explained: The Future of Trading Uncertainty with Hyperliquid HIP-4 In this special bonus episode of RIFT Before You Quit, we introduce one of the most exciting developments in modern financial markets: Prediction Markets.

Already integrated into the RIFT ecosystem through Hyperliquid's HIP-4 protocol, prediction markets allow users to participate in an entirely new asset class where uncertainty itself becomes tradable.

Rather than asking "How will this event affect Bitcoin?", prediction markets ask:

Will Bitcoin close above a certain price?
Will inflation exceed expectations?
Will interest rates increase?
Will a political candidate win?
Will a sports team become world champion?

Instead of buying or selling the underlying asset, traders buy and sell the probability of an event occurring.

This episode provides a comprehensive introduction to how prediction markets work, why they have become a multi-billion-dollar industry, and how they fit into the future of decentralized finance.

Throughout the session, we explore:

• What prediction markets are and why they exist

• How uncertain events become tradable financial contracts

• The difference between traditional investing and trading probabilities

• How market prices continuously reflect changing information

• Why prediction markets are considered powerful information discovery mechanisms

• Understanding "Yes" and "No" outcome contracts

• How probabilities move between 0% and 100%

• Trading both sides of an event as market sentiment changes

• Why capital-backed opinions are often more valuable than surveys or polls

The episode also explains how market pricing is created through real buying and selling activity rather than platform manipulation.

You'll learn about:

• Supply and demand within prediction markets

• How order books function

• Automated Market Makers (AMMs)

• Liquidity providers

• Market makers

• Price discovery

• Slippage

• Market depth

• Why liquidity is essential for efficient prediction markets

The presentation then dives deeper into one of the most important aspects of any prediction market: event resolution.

You'll discover why clearly defined rules are critical, including:

• Settlement times

• Official data sources

• Price oracles

• Blockchain-based settlement

• Resolution procedures

• Why objective verification creates trust

The episode also compares many of today's leading prediction market platforms, including:

• Polymarket

• Kalshi

• PredictIt

• Augur

• Manifold Markets

Each platform is examined to understand how prediction markets have evolved across centralized, decentralized, regulated, and community-driven environments.

One of the key themes throughout this bonus episode is that prediction markets are not gambling platforms.

Instead, they are sophisticated financial systems that aggregate information from thousands of participants, allowing markets to continuously estimate the probability of future events.

As participants buy and sell contracts based on new information, market prices adjust in real time, creating dynamic forecasts backed by financial incentives rather than simple opinions.

The discussion also explores how prediction markets complement traditional financial markets.

Instead of only reacting to events after they happen, traders can now position themselves based on the evolving probability that an event will occur in the first place.

This represents a significant evolution in financial infrastructure and aligns closely with the long-term vision of decentralized, data-driven markets.

With RIFT integrating Hyperliquid's HIP-4 protocol, users gain access to an emerging category of financial products built around probability, information, and real-time market consensus.

This bonus session is ideal for:

Crypto traders
Futures traders
DeFi enthusiasts
Hyperliquid users
RIFT community members
Investors interested in market psychology
Anyone curious about the future of decentralized financial markets

Whether you're completely new to prediction markets or already familiar with platforms like Polymarket, this episode provides an accessible introduction to one of the fastest-growing sectors in modern finance.

In this episode you'll learn:

✅ What prediction markets are

✅ How probability becomes tradable

✅ How Hyperliquid HIP-4 works

✅ Why RIFT has integrated prediction markets

✅ Order books vs Automated Market Makers

✅ Liquidity and market pricing

✅ Event settlement and blockchain oracles

✅ Major prediction market platforms

✅ Why prediction markets may become a core layer of future financial infrastructure

RIFT Before You Quit is an educational series designed to help traders move beyond emotion and speculation by understanding how modern financial markets are evolving through AI, automation, decentralized infrastructure, institutional concepts, and structured trading systems.

videos.title: Hindi - 13.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 13.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: My AI Agents Clipped This Stream While I Slept
videos.summary_source_text:
My AI Agents Clipped This Stream While I Slept I went to sleep and my AI agents kept working. On this live stream I build the system that clips my streams in real time, picks the best moments and posts them to X while I do absolutely nothing. We wire it up live with Claude Code on my own local hardware, from Gaia Stream to Tank, my 24/7 agent orchestrator. If you have ever wanted AI employees that work around the clock on your content, this is the blueprint. Say hello in the chat, I read every comment live on air and your ideas steer the build.

videos.title: Why is Vagal Tone Important?
videos.summary_source_text:
Why is Vagal Tone Important? Homeostasis is the body's ability to maintain balance despite constant changes in the environment. The vagus nerve plays an essential role in that process by helping the body recover after physical or emotional stress. The stronger the vagal tone, the better the body can adapt to everyday challenges and return to a healthy baseline.

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Aristotle Education and has been practicing medicine in Central Florida for over 35 years. He is also the founder and medical director of Cardiovascular Interventions, PA, where since 1990 he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor. Throughout his distinguished career, he has performed thousands of interventional procedures in both hospital and outpatient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease. He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida.
videos.summary: Homeostasis is the body's ability to maintain balance despite constant changes in the environment. The vagus nerve plays an essential role in that process by helping the body recover after physical or emotional stress.

videos.title: 7 Punch Turn Essentials
videos.summary_source_text:
7 Punch Turn Essentials The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Build A Custom Browser Extension [SUPER Easy!]
videos.summary_source_text:
Build A Custom Browser Extension [SUPER Easy!] I built a fully functioning Chrome extension in about 10 minutes.

I used the new GLM 5.2 model to build it. It's open-weight, open-source and incredibly cost-effective for coding tasks while still being reliable and delivery high-quality outputs (not sponsored, just sharing because I like it a lot). 

Once you run the prompt, here's how you install it:
1️⃣ Save the files generated by GLM 5.2 (or whichever AI model you choose for this) into a folder on your computer.
2️⃣ Open Google Chrome, click the three dots in the top right, and go to Extensions ➡️ Manage Extensions (or type chrome://extensions/ in your search bar).
3️⃣ Toggle on Developer Mode in the top right-hand corner.
4️⃣ Click Load unpacked in the top left, and select your folder.

Just like that, your custom extension is installed and ready to use.

📌 SAVE this video so you can refer back to the steps later, and follow for more practical AI tips!
